summary: Comprehensive testing of Numerology and Wisdom Journal features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly including Numerology personal reading with all 5 numbers, compatibility calculation, Wisdom Journal CRUD operations, and navigation links in More dropdown.

minor.issue: Date format MM-DD-YYYY is accepted but produces incorrect results (parses as year=MM, month=DD, day=YYYY). Should validate YYYY-MM-DD format strictly.

issues: Console warning: span cannot be child of option element - minor hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: None required - numerology calculations are algorithmic, teachers are hardcoded in backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Numerology and Wisdom Journal features fully tested. Numerology uses Pythagorean system with master numbers 11, 22, 33 preserved. Life Path calculated by reducing month, day, year separately then adding. Wisdom Journal stores entries in MongoDB 'wisdom_journal' collection with teacher/teaching/quote linking.

numerology_backend.POST /api/numerology/calculate: Returns all 5 numbers (life_path, destiny, soul_urge, personality, birthday) with full meanings
numerology_backend.master_numbers: 11, 22, 33 are preserved and not reduced further
numerology_backend.validation: Returns 400 for missing name/date or invalid date format

numerology_frontend.tabs: Personal Reading and Compatibility tabs visible
numerology_frontend.personal_reading: Form accepts name + date, shows all 5 numbers with meanings, strengths, challenges, spiritual lesson
numerology_frontend.compatibility: Dual input form, shows harmony score with progress bar and dynamic description

wisdom_journal_backend.POST /api/wisdom-journal: Creates new reflection entry with teacher/teaching/quote linking
wisdom_journal_backend.DELETE /api/wisdom-journal/{id}: Deletes entry, returns 404 for invalid ID
wisdom_journal_backend.authentication: All endpoints require valid JWT token

wisdom_journal_frontend.new_entry_form: Form with teacher select, teaching dropdown (appears after teacher selection), quote dropdown, reflection textarea
wisdom_journal_frontend.save_reflection: Saves entry and displays in entries list
wisdom_journal_frontend.delete_entry: Delete button removes entry with toast confirmation
wisdom_journal_frontend.navigation: Wisdom Log link in More dropdown (data-testid='nav-more-wisdom log')

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/numerology/calculate with John + 1990-07-15 - Life Path 5 verified
POST /api/numerology/calculate with master number date - 11 preserved
frontend_ui_tested: Numerology page renders with Personal Reading and Compatibility tabs
Personal Reading form accepts name and birth date
Calculate button triggers API call and displays result
Result shows all 5 numbers: Life Path, Destiny, Soul Urge, Personality, Birthday
Life Path section shows title, element, meaning, strengths, challenges, spiritual lesson
Compatibility tab shows dual input form for two people
Compatibility result shows harmony score percentage and dynamic description
Wisdom Journal page renders with new reflection form
Teacher dropdown shows list of teachers
Quote dropdown appears after teacher selection
Entry appears in entries list with teacher name, teaching title, date
Delete button removes entry with toast notification
Navigation More dropdown contains Numerology and Wisdom Log links
